title: In Japan’s ‘Little Brazil,’ a World Cup Showdown Tests Loyalties
summary_full: More than 200,000 Brazilians live in Japan, after more than a century of migration between the countries. Many are of Japanese descent, so which team are they cheering on?
summary_public: More than 200,000 Brazilians live in Japan, after more than a century of migration between the countries. Many are of Japanese descent, so which team are they cheering on?
